g.text: Wₘ = [Tx, Ty, Tz, Fx, Fy, Fz]
Goal: Minimize wrench residual subject to bounded design variables
LHS sampling→ N well-spaced seeds F0
F = [F₁, s₁, θ₁, F₂, s₂, θ₂] ∈ ℝ⁶

Transverse, concentric, follower forces; purely elastic deformation
